results.title: Overlapping writes to same filing produce a complete, valid file (real SEC calls)
results.feedback:
Verify via store OK, 但 YAML 與接下去一小部分 markdown 是像下面 ``` 裡這樣，好像多了 title 的 YAML 那一段，我不確定這樣是不是正確的。
```
---
ticker: AAPL
cik: '320193'
company_name: Apple Inc.
filing_type: 10-K
filing_date: '2025-10-31'
fiscal_year: 2025
accession_number: 0000320193-25-000079
source_url: https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/320193/000032019325000079/aapl-20250927.htm
parsed_at: '2026-04-04T13:27:07.780867+00:00'
converter: html-to-markdown
---

---
title: aapl-20250927
---

results.title: Invalid inputs produce distinct, actionable errors (real SEC calls)
results.feedback:
下面兩個```裡是出現的整段 Log，不確定這是不是就是你說的 error，雖然最後有 raise，但前面有很多 trace：
1. Ticker Not Found Error
2. Filing Not Found Error

```
(finlab-x-backend) dong.wyt@Dongs-MacBook-Air fin-lab-x-sec-download-parsing % python -c "from backend.ingestion.sec_filing_pipeline import SECFilingPipeline; p = SECFilingPipeline.create(); p.process('DEFINITELYNOTAREALTICKER12345', '10-K')"
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/Users/dong.wyt/Documents/dev-projects/fin-lab-x-sec-download-parsing/backend/ingestion/sec_filing_pipeline/sec_downloader.py", line 34, in download
    company = Company(ticker)
              ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/Users/dong.wyt/Documents/dev-projects/fin-lab-x-sec-download-parsing/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/edgar/entity/core.py", line 583, in __init__
    super().__init__(cik_or_ticker)
  File "/Users/dong.wyt/Documents/dev-projects/fin-lab-x-sec-download-parsing/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/edgar/entity/core.py", line 249, in __init__
    raise CompanyNotFoundError(
